expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总的测量值，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นการวัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] เป็นความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] เป็นความหนาวัสดุแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Bảng Trên, Dưới và Bảng Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Bảng Sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Pang-itaas, Ilalim at Side Board, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Likod na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ရာၵ်ႉၶၢဝ်းထားႇၽွၵ်းၵူတ်ႇ ဝႆႉမိုၼ်း [Width]၊ [Height]၊ [Depth] ၵေႃႈၽွၼ်ႉႁႅၼ်း ၽိုၵ်း [BoardThick] ႁႅၼ်းဢၼ် ပီႈလႅမ်ႇၼႀႃ ဓားႄႃးၵူတ်ႇတုၵ်ႇ, [BackBoardThick] ႁႅၼ်းဢၼ် ဓားႄႃးၵူတ်ႇဢတ်ႇႁိၼ်း။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអង្សារគណនាសម្រាប់ធ្នើរ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាផ្លៃប្រចាំម៉ោង [BoardThick] គឺជាបំហាត់សាច់ដុំបញ្ចាំងខាងលើ ខាងក្រោម និងឆេង និង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាវត្តមានសាច់ដុំបំបែកខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄໍານວນຂະໜາດຂອງແຜ່ນບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂໍ້ມູນສອບຖາມເຕັມປ່ຽນ [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດຖຸສະຫນອງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດຖຸສະຫນອງຕົວຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は全体の寸法を表し、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、横板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick]はバックボードの材料厚さを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수를 나타내며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료의 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료의 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla posterior. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Hintergrundplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक अलमारी के लिए बोर्ड आकारों की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पिछली बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
